summary: Coerced lease signing under duress at Cricklewood MHP LLC in March 2024. User forced to travel 35 minutes to sign under threat of eviction.

timeline.March 2024: User coerced into signing new lease at different park
timeline.April 2024: Billing increases to $695 despite violations, rent charged without lease clarity

legal_conflicts.entity_mismatch: Lease and eviction filed under different entities (Shady Oaks Park MHP LLC vs Shady Oaks MHP LLC)
legal_conflicts.duress: Lease signed under pressure, not freely entered
legal_conflicts.fraud: Charging rent during ongoing EGLE sewage violations
legal_conflicts.retaliation: Lease ultimatum issued during health crisis
legal_conflicts.no_disclosure: Lease change did not disclose management/company change

legal_triggers: Motion to Vacate for Standing Defect
